final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: full-body hero pose set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate full-body/key pose sheet for the Orbwalker hero. Subject: same hooded adventurer-mage orbwalker in four clear poses: neutral idle, orb-casting attack, hurt/guarded, victory stance. Dark leather and cloth outfit, subtle gold trim, elemental orb magic. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game character art, consistent proportions, clean silhouette. Composition/framing: four full-body poses on one sheet, evenly spaced, simple neutral background, no UI. Lighting/mood: readable, heroic, magical. Color palette: dark cloak, gold trim, elemental cyan/orange/multicolor glow accents. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid cropped feet or hands.
